briefdescription.para: Emit a single byte to the CBOR output.
Encode a CBOR header (major type + argument).

detaileddescription.para: Follows the CBOR additional-info rules for all major types 0-5.

parameterdescription.para: Writer to initialize. Must not be NULL.
Output buffer. Must not be NULL.

briefdescription.para: Open a CBOR map with count key-value pairs.

detaileddescription.para: Caller must write exactly count pairs (key item + value item each) after this call.

parameterdescription.para: Number of key-value pairs that follow.

briefdescription.para: Open a CBOR array with count items.

detaileddescription.para: Caller must write exactly count items after this call.
Positive values are encoded as major type 0 (uint). Negative values are encoded as major type 1.

briefdescription.para: Write an IEEE 754 single-precision float (major type 7, info=26).
Write a UTF-8 text string (major type 3).

parameterdescription.para: Byte length (not counting any null terminator).

briefdescription.para: Write a null-terminated UTF-8 text string.
